contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 75
- Description: Local-LLM to Sophia execution handoff: create_telegram_topic tool + governor-signed ping_sophia trigger
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/119
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/63
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/346
  
  Details:
  Built the end-to-end handoff so a governor can craft a plan with a local LLM, commit the roadmap to agentic_ai_context (the baton), trigger Sophia, then step into Telegram to monitor execution with her in a dedicated topic. (1) truesight_autopilot create_telegram_topic tool (#119): Sophia opens a forum topic on request via Bot API createForumTopic, resolves the target chat from the current Telegram session or the new TELEGRAM_HOME_GROUP_ID setting, posts an optional kickoff, returns a deep link, and surfaces an actionable error if the bot lacks Manage-Topics admin; 7 unit tests. (2) dao_protocol ping_sophia module + truesight-dao-ping-sophia console script (#63): signs a one-shot message the way Sophia's /chat-blocking expects (RSA-PKCS1v15/SHA256 over canonical JSON, X-Public-Key) so any LLM/CLI on a governor's machine can trigger her; access is governor-only, enforced server-side by Sophia (verify_payload governor-registry check returns 403 otherwise). (3) Documented the working group TrueSight DAO Ops (-1003919341801) + bot @truesight_autopilot_bot and the full handoff path in AWS_DIGITAL_INFRASTRUCTURE 4.3 + READMEs (#346). Deployed to the box, set TELEGRAM_HOME_GROUP_ID, validated end-to-end (governor-signed PONG returning the correct instance id, then a real ping that opened a topic in the Ops group). Note: clarified for the operator that the self-test topic vanished because the cleanup step deleted it (forum-topic deletion bounces viewers to General), not a code fault.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 125.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
